title: chomer #2563
definition:
1) cement, mortar, clay
     1a) mortar, cement
     1b) clay
     1c) mire
 2) heap
     2a) swelling, surging (of water)
 3) homer - a unit of dry measure about 65 imperial gallons (300 l)
